title: prenanthes cacaliifolia
intro: Prenanthes cacaliifolia, also known as False Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Prenanthes cacaliifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Prenanthes cacaliifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
